steps.title: Rewrite line p
steps.content:
Put the equation in slope-intercept form.
$$3y+24x=15$$
$$3y=-24x+15$$
$$y=-8x+5$$
So line $p$ has slope $-8$.

steps.title: Find the perpendicular slope
steps.content:
Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals. The negative reciprocal of $-8$ is
$$\frac{1}{8}$$
The answer is C.
